title: Gradum ad Tempus
description: A pack played with a bunch of friends including mod from create ae2 and some adventure mod.
body:
Gradum 2024 Modpack Q1

A Minecraft Multiplayer Adventure

Description:

The Gradum 2024 Modpack Q1 is an exciting Minecraft modpack designed for a fun multiplayer experience with friends. It includes popular mods such as Create and its numerous addons, Mekanism, Applied Energistics 2 (AE2), and the adventurous Ad Astra mod, blending technical, automation, and space exploration aspects. Ideal for players who enjoy engineering challenges, creative building, and interstellar adventures in Minecraft.

Key Features:

  • Create and Addons: Unleash your creativity with mechanical and aesthetic enhancements, complemented by a variety of Create addons for expanded possibilities.
  • Mekanism: Dive into advanced technology and energy systems for a unique engineering experience.
  • Applied Energistics 2 (AE2): Revolutionize resource management with a sophisticated storage system.
  • Ad Astra: Explore the wonders of space and embark on interstellar adventures.

Perfect For:

  • Players seeking a balanced mix of technical challenges, creative building, and space exploration.
  • Minecraft enthusiasts who love collaborating with friends in a dynamic and evolving world.

External Attribution Requirements:

Auto-Leveling.

Passive-Skill-Tree.

Mowzies Mobs.
